title_main:
Living well after 60,
is possible at Silver Happy!
desc_providers:
In order to offer you activities, services and events that meet your expectations, our service providers are rigorously selected.
To guarantee your peace of mind, each provider is thoroughly checked before joining our company:
desc_diplomas:
Systematic verification of diplomas
and professional certifications.
desc_checks: Rigorous checks including criminal record extracts to ensure your safety and peace of mind.
title_quality: At Silver Happy, we leave nothing to chance.
desc_quality:
This requirement allows us to offer you quality human support, secure
and totally adapted to your specific needs, so that your only priority remains your pleasure and your comfort.
title_review: Did you enjoy your first experience?
desc_review: Share your feelings with the Silver Happy community! Your opinion matters and helps other seniors discover our services.
